setting: 同棲していた彼女と別れたばかりの友人Aが、思い出の品を片付けながら前を向こうとするのを、友人Bが励ますシーン。
lyrics:
These tears mean I'm lettin' you go
I'm learnin' how to be alone
I'm broken, but give it time
I'm gon' be alright

These tears mean it's settlin' in
That I'm not gon' see you again
'Til one day in another life
But I'm gon' be al—, I'm gon' be alright

I been missin' you tonight
I'll be missin' you tomorrow
It's the hardest pill to swallow
But I'm startin' to get it down
I try to think of all the times
I thought I wouldn't make it through
But somehow I always do
And I do the same for you

It don't mean I'm good with goodbye-bye-bye
But it ain't all that bad when I cry, cry, cry
'Cause these tears mean I'm lettin' you go
I'm learnin' how to be alone
I'm broken, but give it time
I'm gon' be alright
These tears mean it's settlin' in
That I'm not gon' see you again
'Til one day in another life
But I'm gon' be al—, I'm gon' be alright

I see you everywhere
On the sidewalks of my dreams
Like a distant melody
I hear you callin' and callin' to me
And I love you, but I leave you in the past, baby
Because I need to, to not go insane
And I know I love you the same

It don't mean I'm good with goodbye-bye-bye
But it ain't all that bad when I cry, cry, cry

These tears mean I'm lettin' you go
I'm learnin' how to be alone
I'm broken, but give it time
I'm gon' be alright
These tears mean it's settlin' in
That I'm not gon' see you again
'Til one day in another life
But I'm gon' be al—, I'm gon' be alright

Woah-oh, woah-oh
Woah-oh, I'm gon' be al—, I'm gon' be alright
Woah-oh, woah-oh
Woah-oh, I'm gon' be al—, I'm gon' be alright

lyricsJa.en: These tears mean I'm lettin' you go
lyricsJa.ja: この涙は、君を手放すということ

lyricsJa.en: I'm learnin' how to be alone
lyricsJa.ja: 一人でいる方法を学んでいるんだ

lyricsJa.en: I'm broken, but give it time
lyricsJa.ja: 心はボロボロだけど、時間をかければ

lyricsJa.en: I'm gon' be alright
lyricsJa.ja: きっと大丈夫になる

lyricsJa.en: These tears mean it's settlin' in
lyricsJa.ja: この涙は、現実を受け入れ始めている証拠

lyricsJa.en: That I'm not gon' see you again
lyricsJa.ja: もう君には会えないということを

lyricsJa.en: 'Til one day in another life
lyricsJa.ja: いつか別の人生で会える日まで

lyricsJa.en: But I'm gon' be al—, I'm gon' be alright
lyricsJa.ja: でも僕は大丈... 大丈夫になるよ

lyricsJa.en: I been missin' you tonight
lyricsJa.ja: 今夜、君が恋しくてたまらない

lyricsJa.en: I'll be missin' you tomorrow
lyricsJa.ja: 明日もきっと、君を想うだろう

lyricsJa.en: It's the hardest pill to swallow
lyricsJa.ja: 受け入れるのは、何よりも辛いけれど

lyricsJa.en: But I'm startin' to get it down
lyricsJa.ja: それでも少しずつ、飲み込み始めているんだ

lyricsJa.en: I try to think of all the times
lyricsJa.ja: 乗り越えられないと思った

lyricsJa.en: I thought I wouldn't make it through
lyricsJa.ja: これまでの全ての時のことを思い出してみる

lyricsJa.en: But somehow I always do
lyricsJa.ja: でも、どうにかいつも乗り越えてきた

lyricsJa.en: And I do the same for you
lyricsJa.ja: だから、君に対しても同じようにするよ

lyricsJa.en: It don't mean I'm good with goodbye-bye-bye
lyricsJa.ja: サヨナラが得意になったわけじゃないけれど

lyricsJa.en: But it ain't all that bad when I cry, cry, cry
lyricsJa.ja: こうして泣いている時は、そんなに悪い気分じゃないんだ

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause these tears mean I'm lettin' you go
lyricsJa.ja: だって、この涙は君を手放すということだから

lyricsJa.en: I'm learnin' how to be alone
lyricsJa.ja: 一人でいる方法を学んでいるんだ

lyricsJa.en: I'm broken, but give it time
lyricsJa.ja: 心はボロボロだけど、時間をかければ

lyricsJa.en: I'm gon' be alright
lyricsJa.ja: きっと大丈夫になる

lyricsJa.en: These tears mean it's settlin' in

lyricsJa.en: That I'm not gon' see you again

lyricsJa.en: 'Til one day in another life
lyricsJa.ja: いつか別の人生で会える日まで

lyricsJa.en: But I'm gon' be al—, I'm gon' be alright
lyricsJa.ja: でも僕は大丈... 大丈夫になるよ

lyricsJa.en: I see you everywhere
lyricsJa.ja: どこにいても君が見える

lyricsJa.en: On the sidewalks of my dreams
lyricsJa.ja: 夢の中の歩道の上でも

lyricsJa.en: Like a distant melody
lyricsJa.ja: 遠くで流れるメロディのように

lyricsJa.en: I hear you callin' and callin' to me
lyricsJa.ja: 君が僕を呼ぶ声が何度も聞こえるんだ

lyricsJa.en: And I love you, but I leave you in the past, baby
lyricsJa.ja: 愛しているけれど、君を過去に置いていくよ

lyricsJa.en: Because I need to, to not go insane
lyricsJa.ja: 自分を失わないために、そうする必要があるから

lyricsJa.en: And I know I love you the same
lyricsJa.ja: そして、今でも変わらず君を愛していると分かっている

lyricsJa.ja: サヨナラが得意になったわけじゃないけれど

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Honestly, I been missin' her so much lately.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, I been missin' her so much lately.

sentences.text: This empty apartment is driving me insane.
sentences.displayHtml: This empty apartment is driving me insane.

conversation.japanese: 正直、最近すごく彼女に会いたくてたまらないんだ。この空っぽの部屋にいると、頭がおかしくなりそうだよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Breaking up is rough, but you just have to give it time.
sentences.displayHtml: Breaking up is rough, but you just have to give it time.

conversation.japanese: 完全に普通のことだよ。別れは辛いけど、ここはただ時間をかけるしかないんだ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I know, but it's the hardest pill to swallow.
sentences.displayHtml: I know, but it's the hardest pill to swallow.

sentences.text: I really thought we had a future together.
sentences.displayHtml: I really thought we had a future together.

conversation.japanese: わかってる、でもそれを受け入れるのが本当に辛いんだ。一緒に未来を描けるって本気で思ってたから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: When I went through my divorce, there were days I thought I wouldn't make it through.
sentences.displayHtml: When I went through my divorce, there were days I thought I wouldn't make it through.

conversation.japanese: 僕が離婚を経験した時、「もう自分は乗り越えられない」と思った日もあったさ。でも、君も絶対に乗り越えられる。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I packed up her remaining stuff today.
sentences.displayHtml: I packed up her remaining stuff today.

sentences.text: It felt like I was finally saying, "I'm lettin' you go."
sentences.displayHtml: It felt like I was finally saying, "I'm lettin' you go."

conversation.japanese: ありがとう。今日、彼女の残りの荷物をまとめたんだ。ようやく「君を手放すよ」と伝えられたような気がしたよ。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.japanese: それは大きな前進だよ！心が少しずつ癒えてきている証拠だ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I'm learnin' how to be on my own again.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm learnin' how to be on my own again.

sentences.text: It hurts right now, but I'm gon' be alright.
sentences.displayHtml: It hurts right now, but I'm gon' be alright.

conversation.japanese: うん。もう一度一人で生きていく方法を、今学んでいるところさ。今はまだ胸が痛むけど、僕はきっと大丈夫になる。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Take it one day at a time.
sentences.displayHtml: Take it one day at a time.

conversation.japanese: その通り。一日一日を大切に進もう。僕はいつでも味方だからね。
